title: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
summary: Amazon’s upgraded AI assistant will be able to do more across a wider range of smart home devices. Amazon is launching an update to its Alexa Plus assistant that will allow it to connect to smart home devices in new ways.
